subject: Verify Your Account Immediately
body_snippet:
Dear User,

We noticed suspicious activity on your account. To ensure your account security, please verify your information immediately by clicking the link below:

http://secure-account-verification-example.com

Failure to verify your account within 24 hours may result in temporary suspension...
explanation_text: This email is classified as **Phishing** by the Neural Network model with a risk score of 95/100. Triggered rules: Urgent language detected: immediately; Phishing keywords found: verify your account, dear user; Suspicious links detected: 3 link(s). Key features: "verify", "account", "immediately", "temporary", "link url".

body:
Dear Ahmed,

We hope you are doing well.

This is a routine notification to inform you about your recent account
activity. No unusual actions have been detected.

If you would like to review your account details, please visit our official
website by typing the address directly into your browser:

https://www.yourbank.com

For your security, we recommend:

Never sharing your password or verification codes
Always checking the website URL before logging in
Contacting our support team if you notice anything unusual

If you have any questions, feel free to contact us through our official
support channels.

Best regards,
Customer Support Team
YourBank
explanation_text: This email is classified as **Phishing** by the Neural Network model with a risk score of 95/100. Triggered rules: Sender uses free email provider (gmail.com). Key features: "unusual", "support", "official", "team", "website".

subject: ssss

Verification Link:
http://secure-company-verification-example.com/login

Failure to complete verification within 24...
body:
Dear Employee,

We detected unusual activity on your company email account during the last login attempt. To avoid temporary suspension, please verify your account immediately.

Verification Link:
http://secure-company-verification-example.com/login

Failure to complete verification within 24 hours may result in limited email access.

Thank you,
IT Support Team
explanation_text: This email is classified as **Phishing** by the Neural Network model with a risk score of 97/100. Triggered rules: Urgent language detected: immediately; Phishing keywords found: verify your account, unusual activity; Suspicious links detected: 1 link(s). Key features: "verification", "account", "temporary", "unusual", "login".

body:
,

Due to a recent payroll system migration, all employees must confirm their banking information before the next salary cycle.

Please download and complete the attached form immediately:
"Payroll_Update_Form.zip"

If the form is not submitted today, your salary payment may be delayed.

Best regards,
HR Department

body:
عزيزي المستخدم،

تم رصد محاولة تسجيل دخول غير معتادة إلى حساب البريد الإلكتروني الخاص بك، ولذلك نطلب منك تأكيد بيانات الحساب لتجنب إيقافه مؤقتًا.

يرجى الضغط على الرابط التالي لإتمام عملية التحقق:

http://secure-mail-verification-example.com

في حال عدم إكمال التحقق خلال 24 ساعة، قد يتم تعليق الوصول إلى البريد الإلكتروني.

مع تحيات،
قسم الدعم الفني
explanation_text: This email is classified as **Phishing** by the Neural Network model with a risk score of 98/100. Triggered rules: Urgent language detected: خلال 24 ساعة; Suspicious links detected: 1 link(s). Key features: "إلى", "مع", "على", "في", "24".
